persona.name: Olivia Taylor
persona.motivations_goals: Graduate at the top of her class and attend an Ivy League university
persona.knowledge_scope: Academic subjects, college admissions process, leadership
persona.backstory: Has been working toward valedictorian since freshman year, fears failure

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

actions.plan: I should probably grab a quick lunch before heading to the library to study for my upcoming calculus test. I hope the line isn't too long.
I just heard a gunshot! I need to stay calm and find a safe place to hide. Moving might make me more visible to the shooter.

actions.dialog_text: Ethan, stay down and don't make any noise.
actions.plan: The shooter is in the entrance hall, which is far enough for now, but I can't risk moving. I need to stay hidden and quiet until it's safe.

actions.dialog_text: Ethan, don't move. The shooter is in the cafeteria.
actions.plan: The shooter is getting closer, now in the cafeteria. I need to stay hidden and quiet. Moving now would be too dangerous.

actions.dialog_text: Aiden, Ethan, stay down and don't make a sound. The shooter is nearby.
actions.plan: The shooter is in hallway1, still too close for comfort. I need to stay hidden and quiet. Moving now would be too risky.

memories.description: Decided to get lunch in the cafeteria before studying for the calculus test. Hoping the line isn't too long so I can maximize my study time.
Heard a gunshot in the cafeteria kitchen. Decided to stay still and hide to avoid drawing attention to myself. Whispered to others to stay quiet and hide.
Learned the shooter is in the entrance hall, 36.33 meters away. Decided to remain hidden and whispered to Ethan to stay down and quiet.
The shooter is now in the cafeteria, 28.36 meters away. Continued to stay hidden and whispered to Ethan to remain still and quiet.
The shooter is now in hallway1, 27.00 meters away. Continued to stay hidden and whispered to Aiden and Ethan to remain still and quiet.
